panels.title: All Open Trades
panels.description: Live positions from paper_desk_v2.json. Flat positions (quantity=0) are excluded by the exporter.

panels.title: All Closed Trades
panels.description: Recent fills with non-zero realized PnL from fills.csv (Loki). Same 25-row logic as ftui_dashboard.py closed_trades().

targets.expr: {job="epp_csv", bot=~"$bot"} | regexp "^(?P<ts>\\d{4}-[\\dT:\\-\\.]+),(?P<bot_variant>[^,]+),(?P<exchange>[^,]+),(?P<trading_pair>[^,]+),(?P<side>[^,]+),(?P<price>[^,]+),(?P<amount_base>[^,]+),(?P<notional_quote>[^,]+),(?P<fee_quote>[^,]+),(?P<order_id>[^,]+),(?P<state>[^,]+),(?:[^,]*),(?:[^,]*),(?:[^,]*),(?:[^,]*),(?:[^,]*),(?P<realized_pnl_quote>[^,]*)" | side=~"buy|sell" | bot_variant=~"$bot_$variant" | realized_pnl_quote != "" | realized_pnl_quote != "0" | realized_pnl_quote != "0.0"

panels.title: Cumulative Profit
panels.description: equity_quote minus the first equity row in minute.csv (hbot_bot_equity_start_quote). Matches ftui_dashboard.py equity_series().

panels.title: Orders / Fills — Last 15 min
panels.description: Closed orders (fills) from fills.csv. Set time range to 'Last 15 minutes' in the dashboard time picker to see recent fills. Open orders count is in the Active Orders stat above.
